race.comment: The 1312m 0-56 at Echuca on May 23 looks the key form reference for this, with 2nd, 3rd and 4th all lining up. MR CHARISMATIC (6) was the first of them home and he was only first-up that day, so he should have more improvement to come than the others. He'll get back anyway, so the wide gate isn't the end of the world. TRUE PROPHET (3) wasn't far away in third, though, which was the fourth top-three finish from as many starts this time in, so there's no reason to think he won't be around the mark again. ALTRUIST (4) was close up in fourth and while that was his best run in a long time, it was also the first run for a new stable, so the change might reinvigorate him. SQUAGAGA (11) brings a different formline and was quite plain last start but gave a sight on-speed at a huge price the start prior and could give them something to catch. KING INCANTO (2) will find this much easier than last start and should be nearing peak fitness now at the third run back.
